description: model method that orchestrates multiple saves — controller pushed logic into model, right direction but long
input:
class Order < ApplicationRecord
  def complete!(payment_method)
    transaction do
      charge = Stripe::Charge.create(
        amount: total_cents,
        currency: 'usd',
        source: payment_method.stripe_token
      )
      update!(status: :completed, charge_id: charge.id, completed_at: Time.current)
      line_items.each(&:fulfill!)
      OrderMailer.confirmation(self).deliver_later
    end
  end
end
